description: Similar in size to the American Goldfinch they were with. White and brownish grey with streaked belly, pinkish upper chest. Red cap and yellow bill. Black beard.Behaviors: Whole flock flying from one side of the Country Road to the other. Back and forth back and forth with American Goldfinch in winter plumage. Seemed to hanging around dried up thistle plants. Seen on 2-6-13.Call: Mostly quietPlumage: Winter
